summary: Frontend-only testing of Kilolab i18n translations and video section. All 6 features tested successfully. FAQ page displays 'Questions fréquentes' in French with all categories (SERVICE, LIVRAISON, PAIEMENT). Contact page shows 'Contactez-nous' with functional form. Tarifs page displays 'Tarifs simples. Sans surprise.' with pricing cards (3€/kg Standard, 5€/kg Express). Landing page video section shows 'Découvrez Kilolab en vidéo' with HTML5 video from Coverr.co. Language switching FR/EN via flag button works - verified FAQ shows 'Frequently Asked Questions' and Contact shows 'Contact us' when switched to English. Navigation from Navbar to FAQ, Contact, Tarifs all functional.
passed_tests: FAQ page (/faq) displays 'Questions fréquentes' title in French
FAQ page has all categories translated: SERVICE, LIVRAISON, PAIEMENT, PROBLÈMES
FAQ accordion questions expand/collapse properly with French translations
Contact page (/contact) displays 'Contactez-nous' title in French
Contact page has functional form with email, subject, message fields
Contact page shows info cards (Email, Horaires, Zone) in French
Tarifs page (/tarifs) displays 'Tarifs simples. Sans surprise.' in French
Tarifs page shows Standard pricing (3€/kg) and Express pricing (5€/kg)
Landing page has video section with title 'Découvrez Kilolab en vidéo'
Video section shows HTML5 video with Coverr.co source and poster image
Video has overlay text 'Votre linge, notre priorité' and 'Dès 3€/kg' badge
Navigation from Navbar to FAQ works (data-testid='nav-faq')
Navigation from Navbar to Contact works (data-testid='nav-contact')
Navigation from Navbar to Tarifs works (data-testid='nav-tarifs')
Language selector flag button visible in navbar (button[aria-label='Change language'])
Language dropdown opens showing 'Français' and 'English' options
Language switch to English works - FAQ shows 'Frequently Asked Questions'
Language switch to English works - Contact shows 'Contact us'
Language switch to English works - Navbar shows 'Pricing', 'Find a Washer', 'Order now'
critical_code_review_comments: i18next integration working correctly with useTranslation hook across FAQ, Contact, and Tarifs pages
Translation files fr.json and en.json both complete with all required keys
HTML5 video properly implemented with autoplay, loop, muted, playsInline attributes
Video uses Coverr.co free stock footage - no external iframe dependency
Language preference persisted to localStorage via 'kilolab-lang' key
React Router future flag warnings in console (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath) - non-blocking
data-testid attributes properly implemented on navigation links for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n translations fully tested on FAQ, Contact, Tarifs pages. Video section on Landing page verified with HTML5 video from Coverr.co. Language switching between FR and EN working via flag button in navbar. All navigation links from navbar functional. Admin Dashboard Heatmap testing was mentioned but not tested in this iteration as it requires authentication.
